tasks.subject: Task 0: Documentation page skeleton with route and section navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Documentation page component with layout, section navigation, and register the `/docs` route.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/pages/Documentation.tsx`
- Modify: `src/App.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `/docs` route renders the Documentation page (public, no auth)
- Page has header matching app style
- Sidebar navigation lists all sections
- Clicking a section scrolls to it
- Responsive layout

**Verify:** `npm run build` â†’ no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/pages/Documentation.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["route /docs renders Documentation page", "header matches app style", "section navigation works", "responsive layout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add navigation links to Documentation from existing pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Docs links from Index header/footer and Dashboard TOOL_REGISTRY.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/pages/Index.tsx`
- Modify: `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Docs link in Index header
- Docs link in footer
- TOOL_REGISTRY entry for /docs

**Verify:** `npm run build` â†’ no errors
